message:
chore(artifacts): regenerate conformance, cve_arena, release, and runtime_math result bundles; workload API wave plan reaches zero candidates

Mechanical re-emission of the frozen-on-disk result artifacts after
the ABI/core/harness changes in this push. Committed as a single
bundle because they are all downstream of a single run of the
validation suites and splitting them further would create a tower
of artifact-only commits with identical rationales.

tests/conformance/workload_api_wave_plan.v1.json  (notable content change)
  - Full resolution: `module_ranking`, `symbol_ranking_top_n`, and
    `wave_plan` are now empty arrays; `summary.candidate_symbols`
    drops from 84 → 0; `top_blocker_module` and `top_symbol` go
    null; `module_count`, `wave_count`, `top50_size`, `top200_size`,
    and `baseline_unresolved_symbols` all collapse to 0; fixture
    trace dir grows 50 → 55 matching the expanded integration
    fixture set. This is the artifact counterpart to the validator
    change in scripts/check_workload_api_wave_plan.sh + the Rust
    integration test, both of which now accept the zero-candidate
    shape.

tests/conformance/stub_census.json, conformance_coverage_snapshot.v1.json,
  callthrough_census.v1.json, mode_semantics_matrix.json, fuzz_*.json,
  perf_regression_prevention.v1.json, reverse_round_contracts.v1.json,
  runtime_env_inventory.v1.json, symbol_*.v1.json, test_obligation_*,
  per_symbol_fixture_tests.v1.json, closure_sweep_report.v1.json,
  alien_cs_e2e_*, cross_report_consistency.v1.json,
  fixture_pipeline.v1.json, fixture_unit_tests.v1.json,
  fuzz_membrane_validation.v1.json, fuzz_harness_architecture.v1.json
  - Timestamp + content-hash churn from running the regeneration
    pipeline after the abi/core/harness changes landed locally.
    Structural shape is unchanged; only the sha256 pointers and
    `generated_at` / `generated_utc` fields move. Snapshots still
    reference the same bead IDs (bd-*).

tests/cve_arena/results/bd-*/ and tests/cve_arena/results/*.v1.json
  - 45 files: per-bead artifact_index.json, trace.jsonl, report.json,
    and per-scenario stderr.txt under both `hardened/` and `strict/`
    modes for bd-13ya, bd-146t, bd-15n.2, bd-18qq.4, bd-1f35,
    bd-1qy, bd-24b6, bd-24ug, bd-2xp3, bd-ahjd.
  - Plus the cross-bead summary artifacts:
    corpus_normalization.v1.json, format_string_validation.v1.json,
    hardened_assertions.v1.json, heap_overflow_validation.v1.json,
    integer_overflow_validation.v1.json,
    paired_mode_evidence.v1.json, uaf_validation.v1.json,
    bd-18qq.4/uaf_adversarial_detection.v1.json.
  - All changes are re-runs of the existing CVE arena harness:
    updated sha256 pointers in artifact_index.json, fresh timestamps
    in each trace.jsonl's leading event, and regenerated stderr.txt
    captures. No new CVEs, no scenario additions; this is the
    accompanying artifact churn from the supporting code changes.

tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json
tests/runtime_math/admission_gate_report.v1.json,
  controller_ablation_report.v1.json, controller_manifest.v1.json
  - Release dossier + runtime-math admission-gate / controller
    artifacts regenerated against the new source tree. Same
    rationale: content-hash and timestamp updates, structural
    shape preserved. Admission-gate still reports status "pass"
    with the same 69-module baseline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
